profile.education: Harvard University (BA); Northeastern University School of Law (JD)
profile.background: Attorney and former professional basketball player in Europe; Massachusetts Attorney General (2015-2023); became first elected female governor of Massachusetts in 2023.

profile.education: University of Houston (BS Speech Pathology), Rutgers University School of Law (JD)
profile.background: Former Harvard Law School professor and consumer protection advocate. Created Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. 2020 presidential candidate. Leading voice on economic inequality. In Senate since 2013.

profile.education: Boston College (BA International Relations), Boston College Law School (JD)
profile.background: Former U.S. House member for 37 years, one of the longest-serving in history. Co-author of Green New Deal. Served in Army Reserve. Former Massachusetts state representative.
